Le Mas · Beaucaire

Maison de Campagne

The mas, the countryside, the quiet.
5guests
2bedrooms
1pool
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

At the heart of the Mas des Prépresses, the Maison de Campagne is a rustic-chic gîte: golden stone, exposed beams, opening onto plane trees and fields as far as the eye can see.

Share the estate’s pool and large garden, borrow the bikes, dine under the plane trees. A Provençal interlude, ten minutes from Beaucaire and the banks of the Rhône.

Amenities

Air conditioning
Equipped kitchen
Fibre Wifi
Queen-size bed
Shared pool (with Maison des Vendangeurs)
Bikes available
Century-old trees
Private parking
Dishwasher

Filter coffee machine
Dolce Gusto coffee machine

Large garden
BBQ
